name: agent-html-workspace
description: Workspace for agent-html packages, docs, and verification.

scripts.app:check: npm --workspace agent-html-app run build && cargo check --manifest-path apps/agent-html-app/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.format:check:source: prettier package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.node.json eslint.config.js vitest.config.ts vitest.heavy.config.ts knip.json README.md ".github/workflows/*.yml" ".github/actions/**/*.yml" "packages/**/*.{ts,mjs,tsx}" "!packages/core/src/generated/**" "scripts/**/*.mjs" "docs-web/content/**/*.mdx" --check
scripts.test:run:full: npm run test:run && npm run test:run:cli-heavy
scripts.docs:web:check: npm run docs:web:typecheck && npm run docs:web:lint && npm run docs:web:build
scripts.release:check:ci: node scripts/release-metadata.mjs channel && npm run check:package:release
scripts.check:quick: npm run format:check:source && npm run lint && npm run test:run
scripts.check:package:quick: npm run format:check:source && npm run lint:package && npm run test:run
scripts.check:package: npm run check:package:quick && npm run test:run:cli-heavy && npm run build
scripts.check:package:release: npm run check:package && npm run knip && npm run verify:pack
scripts.check:docs:ci: npm run docs:lint && npm run docs:web:typecheck && npm run docs:web:build
scripts.check:docs: npm run docs:lint && npm run docs:web:check
scripts.check:all: npm run check:package:release && npm run check:docs
scripts.check:workspace: npm run check:all && npm run app:check
